summary: LAUNCH-DAY pre-flight smoke for mind-mapper.com waitlist gating + signup. ALL critical paths green. Public/private split works (/, /pricing, /privacy, /terms unfettered; /library, /app, /read, /calendar all return AccessGate); ?unlock=mind-mapper67 bypasses the gate. Waitlist API (POST /api/waitlist, GET /api/waitlist/count) passes happy-path, dedupe (new:false on second submit), validation (400 on garbage), and IP rate-limit (6th rapid POST → 429). UI: form submit shows the green 'on the list' confirmation AND the 'Junk/Spam folder' helper text. Landing #features renders the 9 cards in EXACT spec order. CinematicTeaser slide-1 contains 'infinite, interactive canvas'; slide-7 title is 'Master Information\nOrganisation Visually' (newline-split in DOM, NOT a single line) and the body ends with 'Mind-Mapper is the indispensable tool!'. Resend→SMTP fallback chain logs exactly as documented (Resend 403 'domain not verified' → 'falling back to SMTP for …' → 'smtp send OK host=mail.spacemail.com:465'). Cleaned up all 5 launch-test waitlist rows after the run — DB now back to count=0 ready for launch.

ui_bugs.issue: Two DOM elements share id='teaser' (a wrapper <div id='teaser'> from a ScrollReveal block in Landing.jsx ~L148 AND the <section id='teaser'> in CinematicTeaser.jsx ~L91). HTML id must be unique; some tooling (Playwright strict-mode locator, screen-readers, anchor jumps) breaks. Recommend keeping the id on the <section> only and dropping it from the ScrollReveal wrapper, or renaming the wrapper.

passed_tests: GET / loads landing-page; waitlist input NOT rendered on home
GET /pricing public; contains 'cup of coffee per week'
GET /library?unlock=mind-mapper67 bypasses gate and renders Library UI (3 example maps + sidebar)
POST /api/waitlist dedupe → second submit returns new:false; count unchanged
POST /api/waitlist 6-rapid-from-same-IP → 6th request returns 429 with 'minute' in the friendly message
GET /api/waitlist/count → returns int and increments by exactly +1 after a fresh signup
AccessGate form: fill email + click [data-testid=waitlist-submit] → [data-testid=waitlist-joined] visible with 'on the list' text
AccessGate confirmation surfaces the 'Don't see it? Check your Junk/Spam folder' helper
Landing #features renders exactly 9 [data-testid^=feature-card-] cards, h3 titles match the spec order 1→9 verbatim
CinematicTeaser slide-1 sub contains 'infinite, interactive canvas' (verified in source CinematicTeaser.jsx:9 and live DOM)
CinematicTeaser slide-7 title 'Master Information\nOrganisation Visually' + body ends with 'Mind-Mapper is the indispensable tool!' (verified in source CinematicTeaser.jsx:52-53 and live DOM)
Backend pytest suite test_waitlist.py — 6/6 unit tests pass after rate-limit-bucket fixture reset
Backend pytest suite test_launch_smoke.py — 5/5 live-URL tests pass against the preview backend
Resend→SMTP email fallback logs match design: 'resend send failed (… domain is not verified) → falling back to SMTP' followed by 'smtp send OK → … host=mail.spacemail.com:465'
action_items: OPTIONAL (LOW): de-duplicate the id='teaser' attribute — keep on the <section> in CinematicTeaser.jsx and remove from the ScrollReveal wrapper at Landing.jsx ~L148, or rename one. Cosmetic; doesn't block launch.
Domain verification on Resend is still pending — every welcome email is going through SMTP. Functional but worth completing post-launch so Resend's deliverability + analytics kick in.
critical_code_review_comments: waitlist.py rate-limit is in-memory only — multi-replica deployments will undercount across pods. Fine for the single-pod preview/launch but flag for scale-out.

test_waitlist.py originally had a test-isolation bug where the in-memory rate-limit bucket leaked across tests, causing 3/6 to fail with 429s on a clean DB. Fixed by clearing waitlist._recent_hits in the db fixture (setup + teardown).
waitlist.py imports `os` lazily via __import__('os') on line 196 inside _send_welcome — works but unidiomatic; prefer a top-level `import os`.
Resend domain status is logged at WARNING (good); recommend a Slack/email ping when ALL Resend sends fail in a window so we notice if SMTP also breaks.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_waitlist.py (added rate-limit bucket reset to db fixture)
seed_data_creation: Created 5 launch-test+*@mind-mapper.com waitlist rows during the run; ALL deleted at end. db.waitlist.count_documents({}) == 0 confirmed — DB ready for launch from a clean slate.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Waitlist DB is empty; running test_launch_smoke.py will repopulate then auto-clean within the test (each run leaves the DB at the count it had at start, except the count test which adds 1 and does not delete). For a perfectly-clean state run the cleanup snippet at the end of iteration_65 (delete_many on email regex ^launch-test\+). The id='teaser' duplicate is the only loose end and it's cosmetic.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no blocking issues found. Pre-existing test_waitlist.py failures were due to the in-memory _recent_hits dict surviving across pytest test functions (state-leak); fixed by resetting it in the fixture. Email Resend 403 is expected (domain pending verification) and SMTP fallback succeeds — confirmed in supervisor logs.
